name: hk-singh-research-hub
description: Monorepo for HK Singh Research Hub — Next.js frontend + Express/Postgres backend

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Backend uses Node.js directly — no build step needed'
